emails.subject: Revised Sierra Confirm
emails.body: Revised Sierra Confirm Revised per your request. I did remove the conditions precedent. All outs in the Cinergy Trading Firm Contract have expired. I understand that Kern has a final certificate from FERC. Is this the case? We do need to have the executed assignment docs, before we sign this paper.

emails.subject: RE: Revised Sierra Confirm
emails.body: RE: Revised Sierra Confirm Pls raise clean documents duplicates of all three confirms for Sierra Pacific. Initial them and I will send to customer with a cover letter from myself requesting signatures. If there are any questions, give me a call. Thanks, BT To: Tycholiz, Barry
